# Project PRD (llms.txt)

> Functional context for AI agents: the "what" and "why". Loaded early in the AGENTS.md
> cascade, before behavioral rules. Keep it factual and current.
>
> TODO markers: `TODO(confirm)` = product intent, ask a human · `TODO(verify)` = derived from
> code, confirm · `TODO(detect)` = not found, investigate · `TODO(add)` = missing, should exist.

## Goals

- TODO(confirm): the primary goal of this project in one or two sentences.
- TODO(confirm): secondary goals, if any.

## Architecture

- TODO(verify): high-level architecture — components, services, and how data flows between them.
  The detailed module & feature map lives in `.agents/reference/architecture.md`.
- TODO(verify): external systems this project integrates with.

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: TODO(verify)
- Backend: TODO(verify)
- Data store: TODO(verify)
- Infra / deployment: TODO(verify)

## Scope

- **In scope:** TODO(confirm): what this project is responsible for.
- **Out of scope / non-goals:** TODO(confirm): what this project deliberately does not do.
- **Quality intent:** TODO(confirm): e.g. user-facing features require E2E coverage; correctness
  over speed of delivery. (The concrete test/quality *rules* live in `.agents/rules/testing.md`.)

## Key Constraints

- TODO(confirm): performance, compliance, compatibility, or business constraints agents must honor.
